{{Quote|Oh, that smells divine!|[[Raine Taske]], to a trader|<ref name="SWG:StAoCF">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Trader|Sharing the Art of Crafting: Food|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
A '''bofa treat''' was a food eaten as a dessert or as a snack. It was made with [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] and a crust made from [[Cereal/Legends|cereal]].

==Description==
Bofa treats were sweet, dried, [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]]-based snack foods. They were [[Color/Legends|green]] in appearance. In addition to being made of dried fruit, bofa treats consisted of a crust made of [[Cereal/Legends|cereal]].<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|So, my next problem is a recipe for a dessert that I loved as a child. I have the ingredients correct, but it won't set properly. Would you show me how you do it?|Raine Taske, to a trader|<ref name="SWG:StAoCF" />}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a gang called the [[Bofa Treat Gang]] named themselves after this dessert. They were a rival to the [[Meatlumps|Meatlump Gang]], a [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] group which named itself after the [[Meatlump (food)|meatlump]].<ref name="SWG:B">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Bountied!|Corellia}}</ref>

Meanwhile, the trader [[Raine Taske]] met another trader on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]] who taught him how to make delicious bofa treats.<ref name="SWG:StAoCF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bofa treats appeared in the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011. In the [[Star Wars video games|game]], they appeared green and leafy. However, the same graphical model for bofa treats was used for other [[:w:c:swg:Item|items]] in the game such as the [[banthaweed]].<ref name="SWG" />

No source has specified that bofa treats came from the [[Bofa system/Legends|Bofa system]] or [[Bofa II]]. Also, while bofa treats were made out of some sort of fruit, no source has made a connection between the treats and the [[Bofa fruit/Legends|bofa]] fruit.
